name: FireRed-OpenStoryline
description: FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI video editing agent that transforms manual editing into intention-driven directing through natural language interaction, LLM-powered planning, and precise tool orchestration. It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.
readme_summary: FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI-powered video editing agent that allows users to direct video creation through natural language conversations. It leverages LLMs for planning and orchestrates various tools to produce professional-quality videos with a focus on user intention and reusable editing styles.
primary_use_case: AI-assisted video editing and creation through natural language interaction.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled conductor standing in front of a grand orchestra, but instead of musical instruments, the orchestra members are video clips, sound waves, and text elements. The conductor, representing the user, holds a glowing tablet displaying natural language commands. With a sweep of their baton, the video clips seamlessly rearrange, music swells, and text overlays appear, creating a cohesive and dynamic video narrative. Subtle UI elements and data streams flow around the scene, indicating the AI's orchestration. The overall mood is one of creative control and effortless production, rendered in a vibrant, modern digital art style with a focus on clear visual storytelling.

name: Memex
description: Browser extension to curate, annotate, and discuss the most valuable content and ideas on the web. As individuals, teams and communities.
readme_summary: Memex is a browser extension designed to enhance web research and knowledge management. It allows users to bookmark, annotate, highlight, and organize web content with full-text search capabilities across all saved items. The extension aims to streamline the process of recalling and utilizing information found online.
key_features: Mobile Apps for iOS & Android + Encrypted Sync
Backup and restore data to cloud providers
primary_use_case: To provide a comprehensive tool for organizing, searching, and annotating web content, acting as a personal knowledge management system within the browser.
cover_image_prompt: A wise librarian in a vast, organized library, meticulously placing glowing digital threads from scattered web pages (represented as open books and floating scrolls) into a central, illuminated knowledge nexus. Each thread represents a saved webpage, annotation, or highlight. The librarian uses a magnifying glass that reveals searchable text within the threads. Subtle UI elements showing search bars and tag clouds are integrated into the library's architecture. The overall mood is one of discovery and clarity, with a warm, inviting light. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing the interconnectedness of information.

name: Folo
readme_summary: Folo is an AI-powered reader application designed to aggregate and intelligently process content from various sources, including RSS feeds. It aims to provide a streamlined and personalized reading experience by leveraging AI to enhance content discovery and consumption.
primary_use_case: To provide users with a unified and intelligent platform for consuming content from multiple sources, enhanced by AI.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl perched on a stack of diverse books and digital screens, holding a glowing orb of information. The orb projects streams of data, represented as colorful threads, into the owl's eyes, symbolizing AI processing. These threads originate from various icons representing RSS feeds, news articles, and social media. The owl then elegantly weaves these threads into a single, coherent, and beautifully illuminated tapestry of knowledge. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float around the scene, hinting at the underlying technology. The background is a soft, gradient blend of blues and purples, creating a calm and focused atmosphere. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.

name: aspia
description: Remote desktop and file transfer tool.
readme_summary: Aspia is a C++ based remote desktop, file transfer, and system information tool. It allows users to establish connections via ID or direct links, with features like NAT traversal, audio support, text chat, and task management across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
key_features: NAT traversal with connection by ID
primary_use_case: Enabling secure and versatile remote access and control of computers across different operating systems, including overcoming NAT limitations.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, representing Aspia, is seamlessly weaving a digital bridge between two distinct worlds: a bustling modern city (representing a remote computer) and a quiet, cozy home office (representing the user's local machine). The artisan uses glowing threads of data to connect them, allowing for the effortless transfer of files (represented by small, glowing packages) and the remote manipulation of the city's skyline (representing remote desktop control). Subtle UI elements and data streams flow along the bridge, hinting at the underlying technology. The scene is rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant yet professional color palette, emphasizing connectivity and control.

name: ViniPlay
readme_summary: ViniPlay is a self-hosted IPTV player that transforms M3U and EPG files into a modern, high-performance streaming experience. It offers a robust Node.js backend with FFMPEG for stream processing and a responsive frontend for user management, multi-view streaming, and Chromecast support.
key_features: M3U and EPG Source Management (local files, URLs, XC code)
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hosted, feature-rich, and user-friendly IPTV player for managing and streaming M3U playlists with EPG data.
cover_image_prompt: A digital conductor orchestrating a symphony of television streams. The conductor, holding a glowing baton, stands before a grand console displaying multiple live TV feeds as if they were musical notes. Streams flow from M3U playlist scrolls on one side and EPG data books on the other, converging into a harmonious visual display. Subtle UI elements of ViniPlay, like channel grids and player controls, are integrated into the console. The background is a sleek, modern living room with a large screen showcasing the conductor's masterpiece. The overall mood is sophisticated and powerful, with a clean, digital art style and vibrant, glowing accents.
